positive: A minimalist, whimsical illustration of a sleeping sloth draped on a crescent moon, surrounded by delicate bioluminescent flora and stylized stars. The sloth has a gentle, peaceful expression. The composition should be centralized, featuring clean silhouettes and strong, contrastive line work suitable for screen printing on apparel. Use a palette of deep midnight blue, teal, soft lavender, and glowing gold accents. The style should combine modern Scandinavian illustrative art with celestial art nouveau influences. Highly detailed, high contrast, vector illustration quality, suitable for single-color or limited-color printing.
negative: blurry, grainy, low resolution, watermark, text, signature, logo, artifact, multiple subjects, bad anatomy, distorted, messy, photo, photorealism
